evidence.claim: Designed hybrid retrieval system (BM25 + dense vector) for 30M+ profiles
evidence.source_text: designed the company's first hybrid retrieval system combining BM25 with dense vector recall, across a corpus of 30M+ candidate profiles

evidence.claim: Shipped recommendation system from offline to A/B test in 5 months
evidence.source_text: Built and shipped a production recommendation system at a marketplace product, going from offline experimentation to live A/B test in 5 months.

evidence.claim: Improved new-user retention by 11% using Thompson sampling
evidence.source_text: I designed an exploration-exploitation policy using Thompson sampling that improved new-user retention by 11% in the first month.

evidence.claim: Fine-tuned LLaMA-2-7B and Mistral-7B using LoRA/QLoRA
evidence.source_text: Fine-tuned LLaMA-2-7B and Mistral-7B variants using LoRA and QLoRA

evidence.claim: Reduced inference cost from $0.04 to under $0.001
evidence.source_text: Cost per inference dropped from $0.04 with GPT-3.5-fallback to under $0.001.

evidence.claim: Achieved sub-200ms p95 latency via INT8 quantization and batching
evidence.source_text: Deployed the model via BentoML on Kubernetes with sub-200ms p95 latency by quantizing to INT8 and batching at the request level.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes shipping working systems in 6 weeks over theoretical perfection
evidence.source_text: I care more about shipping a working system in 6 weeks than a theoretically perfect one in 6 months.

evidence.claim: Experience with Diffusion Models, FAISS, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, OpenSearch, Haystack, Weaviate, Sentence Transformers, QLoRA, NLP, Pinecone, Recommendation Systems, Python, LangChain, Weights & Biases, OpenCV, Prompt Engineering, Fine-tuning LLMs, YOLO
